violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The top inside of the microwave in the kitchen has excess build-up of debris and needs to be cleaned--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside bottom of the stand-up freezer has food debris and needs to be cleaned.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Floor and back wall in the bag box pop area is not a nonabsorbent surface, bare concrete and sheetrock.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop left in the bucket next to the mop sink was not in a position to allow it to properly dry.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
